title: 173  Prabhupada wrote books for us to advance
speaker: HDG Srila Prabhupada

segments.text: It's very important for anyone who is aspiring to achieve success in spiritual life to engage in serving the Lord.
Many of you may be coming for many years, some of you may be coming for one month, some may be coming for one year, or some may be coming for 5-6 years.
But the key to success is somehow or other you should take to serve the mission of Srila Prabhupada.
Srila Prabhupada is a bona fide spiritual master coming in the disciplic succession of Lord Brahma.
And this is a rare opportunity in this material world to get a bona fide Acharya like that.
And there is a mission of his going on here.
So when we are coming here regularly, if we want to make rapid progress in spiritual life,
then we have to do service.
Coming to temple, having darshan, hearing kirtan, bhajan, honoring prasadam, everything is alright.
But if you want to make quick progress, then we should also take up service.
Some service, it can be anything.
So we should be extremely eager to take up serving the spiritual master.
In that way, we will achieve this affinity to hear the message of the Lord.
Or else, we will not feel like reading.
Prabhupada said,
We have spent many days and nights to write these books for us only.
It's for us to read and advance in spiritual life.
If we do not read these books, just not reading, we have to realize these things.
Only when we completely realize the subject matter explained by Srila Prabhupada,
we will be eligible to go back to God.
So in order to achieve that complete perfection in one life,
we have to begin serving the spiritual master.
So this is a very important quality which is explained.
In this philosophy, it is very important that A person has to selectp observant thinking first and third lines.
It is a very important help, and it is a great help for us to be able to do so.
And we all pray for this.
Then once the
A human person is able to fallen
to true spiritual path,
